steps.title: Identify the key measure
steps.content: The second team concluded K&K had better “methodology explanation” than C&R. The passage defines this through “traceability”—higher traceability means clearer descriptions of procedures.

steps.title: Find what contradicts this
steps.content: D states K&K had lower traceability than C&R—the opposite of the conclusion. The other choices either omit the comparative claim or target a different measure. This matches choice D — D is correct.
